Sorin Simon, born and raised in Transylvania, Romania, also started with classical piano before diving into the world of electronic music. His sound moves between hypnotic and trippy atmospheres and deeply groovy rhythms, blending minimal, microminimal and microhouse influences. In 2017 he founded Unknown Tales, a London-based label dedicated to forward-thinking electronic music.

Tobias Laun, of Italian and German origin, discovered his love for music in early childhood when he began playing the keyboard, a passion that has stayed with him ever since. In 2016 he co-founded Vivus Records with Daniel Broesecke, and together they have built a respected platform in the underground scene. With releases on Baile Musik, Tzinah Records, Seism, Solina and his own label, Tobias has developed a unique sound marked by deep and atmospheric minimal techno, enhanced by surprising vocal elements that appear when least expected.

Together Sorin Simon and Tobias Laun deliver an immersive set that embodies the energy of the Vivus Showcase, a journey through minimal grooves and hypnotic layers recorded live on the dance floor of Renate.
